sections.label: Intro
lines: (A minor F G E)
Ooh, the quiet calls me deeper,
Where pride won’t dare to tread,
In stillness, I lay my soul,
No heavy crown on my head.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: (A minor G F E)
I don’t chase heights beyond my reach,
I’m not lost in grand designs,
Like a child safe in love’s embrace,
I rest where peace aligns.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: (F G A minor)
Let the world spin in its chaos,
I’m held in a quiet space,
A heart unburdened, free to rise,
No longing to chase.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (C F G A minor)
I am calmed and quiet, like a child in mother’s arms,
I’m at rest, I’m at rest,
Oh, my soul is stilled, where no pride or fear can harm,
I’m at rest, I’m at rest.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: (G F E A minor)
No towering dreams to weigh me down,
No thrones for me to claim,
I dwell in the shadow of the divine,
Unseen, unspoken name.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: (A minor F G E)
Hope is my anthem, forever I sing,
A melody eternal, on soft angelic wings,
No rush, no ache, just love that lingers still,
A heart surrendered to the quiet will.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (C F G A minor)
I am calmed and quiet, like a child in mother’s arms,
I’m at rest, I’m at rest,
Oh, my soul is stilled, where no pride or fear can harm,
I’m at rest, I’m at rest.

sections.label: Outro
lines: (F G A minor)
In stillness, I soar, in humbleness, I rise,
A love that keeps me grounded, as it lifts me to the skies.
